scripts.test: node --input-type=module -e "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; const args = process.argv.slice(1).map((arg) => arg.replace(/^frontend\//, '')); const result = spawnSync('npx', ['vitest', 'run', '--config', 'vitest.config.ts', ...args], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
